prerequisites: An active Insightly account with access to retrieve API credentials.
Your Insightly API key, found under User Settings in the API section.
A start date in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ format to mark the earliest record to replicate.

authMethods.name: API key (HTTP Basic authentication)
authMethods.summary: Insightly uses HTTP Basic authentication to identify the calling user. Provide your Insightly API key in the connector's token field. Insightly sends the key as the Base64-encoded username with a blank password.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your Insightly API key
setupSteps.body: Log into Insightly, click your profile avatar in the top right, and select User Settings. Scroll to the API section, where a key is already generated. Copy the API key (you can regenerate a new one if needed).

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key as the token
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied Insightly API key into the connector's token field. This is the secret credential used for HTTP Basic authentication against the Insightly API.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Enter a start_date in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ format. The connector replicates data added on and after this date.

sources.title: How to access your API key in Insightly - Merge.dev
